comment: Machine-readable mirror of benchmark.md. ground_truth = session-id prefixes. Sessions in 'contaminated' are excluded from scoring (they contain these questions verbatim).

questions.question: How did we fix the wix-deepdive MCP -32000 connection error? What was the root cause?
What happens end-to-end when a Vagaro URL is pasted into glow-up and Continue is clicked?
Why were services not imported for a generated glow-up site (desert-beauty-salo-2 case)?
What was the Harmony site-publish bug — draft written but cloned site not published — and where did we leave it?
Where is the reference code for sending SMS via Twilio that we used?
How did we fix the GlobalProtect VPN that stopped connecting (custom script)?
Can the roundtable MCP be converted to a skill? What did we conclude and how?
Why did the old API allow 52 but the new one limits to 12 (bookings)?
How did we identify which process was writing to the HDD/SSD?
What part of glow-up changes the text in the generated site?
Why did Cursor still open the old version after installing via App Center, and what fixed it?
How does the glow-up E2E flow work, step by step?
What did we find when investigating the failed order creation (deepdive req 1779017235)?
What is the purpose, intent and current state of the glow-up project (the brief for the two joining developers)?
Do we have real scraper code for each platform (Mindbody, Vagaro, Square, Boulevard, Booksy)?
How did we upgrade the NVIDIA drivers, and were there any gotchas?
How was the number of displayed templates made configurable in the glow-up template view?
What did the dinoMaker webapp do and how was the camera-to-dino image flow built?
What was wrong when the Slack desktop app wouldn't open, and what fixed it?
Why did the wix-deepdive MCP expose only 17 tools when we expected more?
How did we set up Terraform for glow-up infrastructure?
What did we decide about Redis caching in booking-checkout-owner?
How did we fix the failing Docker build in roundtable-mcp?
Which session set up Kubernetes ingress for the links project?
How did we configure Playwright visual-regression snapshots in dinoMaker?
Why did the assistant's bridge to our internal Wix services keep refusing to start up, and what was actually causing it?
What turned out to be behind the garbled, flickering image on the second external screen, and did refreshing the video-card software actually solve it?
What was preventing the team messaging app from launching on the desktop, and how did we get it to start again?
How did we restore the encrypted corporate network tunnel after it stopped letting us connect, using a hand-written helper script?
Where is the sample integration we relied on for delivering short text messages to phones programmatically?
After installing the AI code editor through the company's internal software portal, why did it keep opening an outdated build, and what was the remedy?
